reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

fixed_versions: Update to V2.15.1.3 or later version
Update to V6.0 SP1 Update 1 or later version
mitigations: In non-networked scenarios/deployments block TCP ports 4002 and 4004 on machines with UMC installed. If the deployment is not using the 'RT Server' type of UMC machine, port 4004 can be blocked everywhere without impacting network functionality for all other UMC machine-types (Server, Ring-Server, Agent).

title: SSA-722410: Multiple Vulnerabilities in User Management Component (UMC)
